articles.title: About this blog
articles.contents:
Yeongeun Jeon


Welcome to our blog! This is the personal blog of Yeongeun Jeon, coming to you from Korea. This is where I’m going to record what I’m studying, especially the analyses using R.
To give you a brief introduction of me,
B.S. Statistics, Yeungnam University, Korea, 2018.02
Ph.D student from Yeungnam University, Korea.
Interests : Mathematical statistics, Time series, Spatial statistics etc.
Project
Visualization Ver. 1
Visualization Ver. 2
